title: Chiropractic Services Agreement
description: An employment or independent contractor agreement for a chiropractor joining a chiropractic clinic or wellness center.
whatsCovered: Definition of professional chiropractic care, spinal adjustments, and practice coverage
HIPAA compliance rules, records storage, and PHI protection
Billing routines, insurance claims, and cash splits
Stark Law, Anti-Kickback Statute, and medical ethics covenants
Standard governing law and medical liability settings
whenToUse: Use this agreement when setting up legal guidelines for chiropractic care, spinal adjustments, and practice coverage to ensure strict compliance with HIPAA and clinical standards.

fields.label: Practice Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 400 Medical Center Dr, Suite 200, Austin, TX 78701

fields.label: Chiropractic Services Scope
fields.placeholder: Describe chiropractic techniques, spinal care adjustments, and patient consultation guidelines...

fields.label: Contractor Rate ($/hr or %)
fields.placeholder: e.g. $80.00 per hour or 45% of billable collections

clauses.heading: CHIROPRACTIC SERVICES AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Healthcare Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {provider_name}, located at {provider_address} ("Practice"), and {client_name}, located at {client_address} ("Participant").

clauses.heading: 1. Professional Clinical Services
clauses.body: Chiropractor agrees to perform professional chiropractic care, spinal adjustments, and patient consultation according to: {adjustments_scope}.

clauses.heading: 2. Payment and Billing Terms
clauses.body: Clinic shall compensate Chiropractor at the rate of {compensation_rate} for services rendered.

clauses.heading: 3. HIPAA Safeguards and Protected Health Information
clauses.body: All patient charts, case files, X-rays, and treatment logs remain the sole property of the Clinic.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Is this contract HIPAA compliant?
faq.answer: Yes. It contains standard clauses requiring both parties to maintain administrative and electronic safeguards for patient data.

faq.question: Can this contract be terminated early?
faq.answer: Yes, standard terms allow termination by either party upon 30 days written notice, provided all patient chart transfer protocols are followed.
